## How to Test

<!--
Step-by-step instructions for a reviewer to verify your change works.
Example:
1. Start the dev server: `npm run start:dev`
2. POST /api/auth/register with a test user
3. Verify the response includes an access_token cookie

## Checklist

- [ ] The app builds without errors (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Existing tests still pass (`npm run test`)
- [ ] New tests added for new behaviour (or explain why not needed)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or debug `console.log` left in
- [ ] Environment variables documented in `.env.example` if new ones were added
- [ ] UI changes are responsive and accessible
- [ ] PR description is clear for a reviewer unfamiliar with the context
